{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Cayman Islands women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2023}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name                = Cayman Islands
| Badge               = Cayman Islands national football team crest.png 
| Badge_size          = 140px
| Nickname            = 
| Association         = [[Cayman Islands Football Association]] (CIFA)
| Confederation       = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation   = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach               = Colin Rowe
| Captain             = [[D'Andre Rowe]]<ref name="compass">{{cite news |last= Russell |first= Seaford |date= June 9, 2024 |title= Cayman's last-minute goal secures historic World Cup qualifier victory |url= https://www.caymancompass.com/2024/06/09/caymans-last-minute-goal-secures-historic-world-cup-qualifier-victory/ |work= Cayman Compass |location= |access-date= June 12, 2024}}</ref>
| Most caps           = [[Ian Lindo]]<br> [[Mark Ebanks]] (23)
| Top scorer          = [[Lee Ramoon]] (12)
| Home Stadium        = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
| FIFA Trigramme      = CAY
| FIFA Rank           = {{FIFA World Rankings|CAY}}
| FIFA max            = 127
| FIFA max date       = November 1995
| FIFA min            = 206
| FIFA min date       = April 2019
| Elo Rank            = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Cayman Islands}}
| Elo max             = 155
| Elo max date        = 1987
| Elo min             = 199
| Elo min date        = March 2019
| pattern_la1         = _whiteborder
| pattern_b1          = _cay21h
| pattern_ra1         = _whiteborder
| pattern_sh1         = _cay21h
| pattern_so1         = _cay21h
| leftarm1            = ff0000
| body1               = ff0000
| rightarm1           = ff0000
| shorts1             = ff0000
| socks1              = C40000
| pattern_la2         = _whiteborder
| pattern_b2          = _cay21a
| pattern_ra2         = _whiteborder
| pattern_sh2         = 
| pattern_so2         = 
| leftarm2            = 0000FF
| body2               = 0000FF
| rightarm2           = 0000FF
| shorts2             = 0000FF
| socks2              = 0000FF
| First game          = {{fb|DMA|1981}} 2–1 {{fb-rt|CAY|old}}<br>([[Roseau]], Dominica; 3 March 1985)
| Largest win         = {{nowrap|{{fb|CAY|old}} 5–0 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>([[Grand Cayman]], Cayman Islands; 2 March 1994)<br>{{fb|CAY|old}} 5–0 {{fb-rt|SXM}}<br>([[Grand Cayman]], Cayman Islands; 4 March 1994)}}
| Largest loss        = {{fb|CAY}} 0–11 {{fb-rt|CAN}}<br>([[Bradenton, Florida|Bradenton]], United States; 29 March 2021)
| Regional name       = [[Caribbean Cup]]
| Regional cup apps   = 4
| Regional cup first  = [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]
| Regional cup best   = Fourth place ([[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]])
}}

The '''Cayman Islands national football team''' represents the [[Cayman Islands]] ([[British Overseas Territories|British overseas territory]]) in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[Cayman Islands Football Association]] founded in 1966. It has been a member of [[FIFA]] and [[CONCACAF]] since 1992. Regionally, it is a member of [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] in the Caribbean Zone. 

Cayman Islands has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup]] and the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]], but has participated four times in League C of the [[CONCACAF Nations League]]. Regionally, the team finished in fourth place in the [[Caribbean Cup]] as hosts in [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]].

Cayman Islands' debut in international competitions was in the first qualifying round of the [[1985 CFU Championship]]. Their first appearance in World Cup qualifiers was in the [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|1998 CONCACAF qualification]]. The team achieved its first victory in 1990, defeating [[Aruba national football team|Aruba]] 2–1.

==History==
===1985–2000===
The Caymanian football team played its first international match on 3 March 1985, against [[Dominica national football team|Dominica]], in [[Roseau]], as part of the [[1985 CFU Championship]]. They lost that match 2–1 with [[Lee Ramoon]] - who would go on to become the team's top scorer - opening the scoring.

They qualified for the [[1991 Caribbean Cup]], falling in the first round. They returned to the tournament in [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]], suffering the same fate. However, the following year, the Cayman Islands jointly organized with Jamaica the [[1995 Caribbean Cup]], reaching the semi-finals. It fell to [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]] by a scandalous 2–9. In the match for 3rd place, they were defeated by [[Cuba national football team|Cuba]] 0–3. They would qualify again in [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]] although they failed to get past the group stage. They have not played a Caribbean Cup final phase since then.

The Cayman Islands participated in their first World Cup qualifying tie in [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|1998]] where they succumbed in the first round at the hands of [[Cuba national football team|Cuba]], who eliminated them after winning twice 0–1 and 0–5.

===2000–2010===
In 2000, given the status of the [[Cayman Islands]] as one of the [[British overseas territories]], the national team attempted to use this as a loophole to call up several uncapped players possessing [[British passport]]s but who had no specific links to the islands. Barry McIntosh, a football agent, was called in to scout players for an upcoming [[FIFA World Cup]] qualifier against [[Cuba national football team|Cuba]] and ultimately he secured eight players i.e. [[Wayne Allison]] ([[Tranmere Rovers]]), [[Ged Brannan]] ([[Motherwell F.C.|Motherwell]]), [[Dave Barnett (footballer)|David Barnett]] ([[Lincoln City F.C.|Lincoln City]]), [[Martin O'Connor (footballer)|Martin O'Connor]] ([[Birmingham City F.C.|Birmingham City]]), [[Dwayne Plummer]] ([[Bristol City F.C.|Bristol City]]), [[Barry Hayles]] ([[Fulham F.C.|Fulham]]), [[Neville Roach]] ([[Southend United]]) and Neil Sharpe ([[Boreham Wood F.C.|Boreham Wood]]). Except Allison the players all appeared in a 5–0 friendly defeat against [[D.C. United]] but before they could appear in any official internationals [[FIFA]] stepped in and barred the players from representing the Cayman Islands due to their failure to satisfy the existing rules for national team eligibility.<ref>[https://www.theguardian.com/football/2008/mar/05/theknowledge.sport Footballers whose loved ones have told them who to play for] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180630185957/https://www.theguardian.com/football/2008/mar/05/theknowledge.sport |date=30 June 2018 }}, ''The Guardian'', 5 March 2008</ref> Of the eight players only Hayles went on to play international football, appearing for [[Jamaica national football team|Jamaica]] ten times.

In the first round of the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2002 qualifiers]], the Cayman Islands was once again eliminated by [[Cuba national football team|Cuba]], winning 4–0 in Havana and drawing 0–0 in George Town. History repeated itself four years later, in the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2006 qualifiers]], since the Cubans eliminated the Caymanian team from the World Cup for the third time in a row (1–2 in George Town and 4–0 in Havana).

Things didn't change significantly for the [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2010 qualifiers]], only this time it was [[Bermuda national football team|Bermuda]] that eliminated the Cayman Islands in the first round, 4–2 on aggregate. Regardless, this tie saw the Caymanians earn their first points away from home, earning a 1–1 draw at Hamilton on 3 February 2008, with [[Allean Grant]] scoring in the 87th minute.

===2010–present===
Qualifying directly into the second round of the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2014 qualifiers]], the Cayman Islands were drawn in group A along with their peers from [[El Salvador national football team|El Salvador]], the [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]] and [[Suriname national football team|Suriname]]. They lost 5 games out of 6, rescuing a 1–1 draw on the last day, on 14 November 2011, against the Dominicans. The Caymanian team did not play any match again in the next few years, since declining their participation in the 2012 and 2014 Caribbean Cups. But they returned to the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2018 qualifiers]], facing [[Belize national football team|Belize]] in the first round. The first leg in Belmopan finished 0–0 and the second leg in George Town finished 1–1. The 1–1 aggregate score meant the Cayman Islands were eliminated on the away goal rule. With this unbeaten elimination, Cayman Islands can say that they are one of the few teams in the world that did not qualify for a FIFA World Cup despite not losing a single match.

==Results and fixtures==
{{main|Cayman Islands national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group A|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 4 June
|time       = {{UTZ|20:00|-3}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BER}}
|score      = 5–0
|team2      = {{fb|CAY}}
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017732
|goals1     =
*[[Zeiko Lewis|Lewis]] {{goal|12|pen.}}
*[[Djair Parfitt|Parfitt]] {{goal|54}}
*[[Kole Hall|Hall]] {{goal|64}}
*[[Reggie Lambe|Lambe]] {{goal|79}}
*[[Julian Carpenter|Carpenter]] {{goal|84}}
|goals2     = 
|location   = [[Devonshire Parish]], Bermuda
|stadium    = [[Bermuda National Stadium]] 
|attendance = 
|referee    = Rubiel Vazquez ([[United States Soccer Federation|United States]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group A|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 7 June
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 0–1
|team2      = {{fb|HON|2022}}
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017734
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
[[Wesley Robinson (footballer)|Robinson]] {{goal|86|o.g.}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Adonis Carrasco ([[Dominican Football Federation|Dominican Republic]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 1–2
|team2      = {{fb|BVI}}
|report     = https://www.concacaf.com/concacaf-series/news/bellechasse-oughterson-score-braces-to-open-concacaf-series/
|goals1     =
*[[Elijah Seymour|Seymour]] {{goal|38}}
|goals2     =
*[[Jordan Bonilla|Bonilla]] {{goal|62|o.g.}}
*[[Javaun Splatt|Splatt]] {{goal|81|pen.}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Kimbell Ward ([[St. Kitts and Nevis Football Association|Saint Kitts and Nevis]])
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 4–0
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1FswyUJNod/?mibextid=wwXIfr
|goals1     =
*[[Gunnar Studenhofft|Studenhofft]] {{goal|16|pen.|58}}
*[[Zachary Scott (footballer)|Scott]] {{goal|28}}
*[[Owens Ebanks|O. Ebanks]] {{goal|84}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Amaury Majors]] ([[Bermuda Football Association|Bermuda]])
|result     = W
}}

===2026===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 26 March
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 1–1
|team2      = {{fb|VGB}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-27/cayman-islands-vs-british-virgin-islands/4095366
|goals1     =
*[[Shakurn Silburn|Silburn]] {{goal|7}}
|goals2     =
*[[Javaun Splatt|Splatt]] {{goal|20}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Alexi Perry]] ([[Jamaica Football Federation|Jamaica]])
|result     = D
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 29 March
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 1–0
|team2      = {{fb|BAH}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-30/cayman-islands-vs-bahamas/4095373
|goals1     = [[Junior Kelly (footballer)|Kelly]] {{goal|59|o.g.}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Tristley Bassue ([[St. Kitts and Nevis Football Association|St. Kitts and Nevis]])
|result     = W
}}
{{football box collapsible
|round             = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]]
|date              = {{Start date|2026|06|06|df=y}}
|time              = {{UTZ|19:00|+1}}
|score             = 4–1
|report            = [https://www.uefa.com/european-qualifiers/friendlies/match/2048313--gibraltar-vs-cayman-islands/ Report (UEFA)]<br>[https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/cesdwwnxbc5fmajgroc0hqzy2/dezv8l0fzgcxtejl0dwmy1gyc/2m9n05frk6wimte4qrptzyxp0/eiia3y15zp6v3l9y2qeqqr8k4?date=2026-06-06 Report (FIFA)]
|team1             = {{fb-rt|GIB}}
|goals1            =
*[[James Scanlon (footballer)|J. Scanlon]] {{goal|12}}
*[[Dylan Borge|Borge]] {{goal|49}}
*[[Julian Valarino|Valarino]] {{goal|57}}
*[[Tjay De Barr|De Barr]] {{goal|59}}
|team2             = {{fb|CAY}}
|goals2            =
*[[Christopher Reeves (footballer)|Reeves]] {{goal|1}}
|stadium           = [[Europa Sports Park|Europa Point Stadium]]
|location          = [[Europa Point]], Gibraltar
|attendance        = 
|referee           = Antoine Chiaramonti ([[Andorran Football Federation|Andorra]])
|result            = L
}}

==Coaching history==

[[File:Alexander González Garces (cropped).jpg|thumb|200px|[[Chandler González]] is a former manager of the Cayman Islands]]

{{div col|colwidth=22em}}
*{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Neider dos Santos]] (1993–1996)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Ken Fogarty]] (1996–1999)
*{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Márcio Máximo]] (2000–2001)
*{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Marcos Tinoco]] (2001–2005)
*{{flagicon|JAM}} [[Carl Brown (footballer)|Carl Brown]] (2006–2011)
*{{flagicon|CAY}} David Braham (2011–2015)
*{{flagicon|CUB}} [[Chandler González]] (2015–2018)
*{{flagicon|CAY}} [[Charles McLean (football coach)|Charles McLean]] (2018)
*{{flagicon|CUB}} [[Chandler González]] (2018–2019)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Benjamin Pugh]] (2019–2021)
*{{flagicon|POR}} [[Cláudio Roberto Garcia Pereira|Cláudio Garcia]] (2023–2024)
*{{flagicon|Netherlands}} [[Joey Jap Tjong]] (2024–2025)
*{{flagicon|CAY}} Colin Rowe (2025–present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===

The following players were called up for the friendly against [[Gibraltar national football team|Gibraltar]] on 6 June 2026.<ref>{{cite web |title=🇰🇾⚽️ Squad Announcement |url=https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1HEiUjPCWK/ |website=Facebook |publisher=Cayman Islands National Teams |access-date=20 May 2026 |date=24 March 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 6 June 2026, after the match against [[Gibraltar national football team|Gibraltar]]''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 1|pos=GK|name=[[Lachlin Lambert]]|age={{bda|2006|6|14|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[NK Dugopolje]]|clubnat=CRO}}
{{nat fs g player|no=12|pos=GK|name=[[Deshawn Whittaker]]|age={{bda|2006|5|31|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Scholars International SC|Scholars International]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 6|pos=DF|name=[[Wesley Robinson (footballer)|Wesley Robinson]]|age={{bda|1993|9|7|df=y}}|caps=23|goals=0|club=[[Elite SC]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs g player|no=23|pos=DF|name=[[Jabari Campbell]]|age={{bda|2000|6|23|df=y}}|caps=23|goals=0|club=[[Utah Avalanche Soccer Club|Utah Avalanche]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 3|pos=DF|name=[[D'Andre Rowe]]|age={{bda|2001|1|5|df=y}}|caps=21|goals=0|club=[[Scholars International SC|Scholars International]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 5|pos=DF|name=[[Cameron Gray (footballer)|Cameron Gray]]|age={{bda|1998|10|22|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=1|club=[[Academy SC]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 2|pos=DF|name=[[Jah Dain Alexander]]|age={{bda|1999|12|8|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=0|club=[[Elite SC|Elite]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs g player|no=18|pos=DF|name=[[Joshwa Campbell]]|age={{bda|2006|2|15|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=1|club=[[UAB Blazers]]|clubnat=USA|}}
{{nat fs g player|no=14|pos=DF|name=[[Kareem Foster]]|age={{bda|2000|09|06|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Sheerwater F.C.|Sheerwater]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=11|pos=MF|name=[[Trey Ebanks]]|age={{bda|2000|6|5|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=0|club=[[FC Oberneuland]]|clubnat=GER}}
{{nat fs g player|no=10|pos=MF|name=[[Zachary Scott (footballer)|Zachary Scott]]|age={{bda|1998|4|2|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=2|club=[[Academy SC]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 8|pos=MF|name=[[Jordan Bonilla]]|age={{bda|1997|2|28|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Scholars International SC|Scholars International]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs g player|no=15|pos=MF|name=[[Shakurn Silburn]]|age={{bda|1999|8|12|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=1|club=[[Elite SC]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 7|pos=FW|name=[[Elijah Seymour]]|age={{bda|1998|11|5|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=3|club=[[Newington F.C.|Newington]]|clubnat=NIR}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 9|pos=FW|name=[[Christopher Reeves (footballer)|Christopher Reeves]]|age={{bda|1997|2|27|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=2|club=[[Elite SC]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs g player|no=21|pos=FW|name=[[Jacobbi Tugman]]|age={{bda|2004|10|3|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club= [[SV Hemelingen]]|clubnat=GER}}
{{nat fs g player|no=16|pos=FW|name=[[Gonzalo McLaughlin]]|age={{bda|2000|6|15|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Tigers FC (Cayman Islands)|Tigers FC]]|clubnat=CAY}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Ramon Sealy]]|age={{bda|1991|4|22|df=y}}|caps=13|goals=0|club=[[Bodden Town FC|Bodden Town]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Kevin Matos-Ebanks]]|age={{bda|2007|1|17|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=Unknown|clubnat=|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Jayden Downey]]|age={{bda|2000|4|11|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Academy SC]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jahziah Johnson]]|age={{bda|2005|2|3|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Darlington School Soccer Academy|Darlington Soccer Academy]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|HON}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jahiem Campbell]]|age={{bda|2004|7|14|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Florida Atlantic Owls]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|HON}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Matthew Suberan]]|age={{bda|1995|2|3|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=0|club=[[Scholars International SC|Scholars International]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dimetri Douglas]]|age={{bda|2000|2|5|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=1|club=[[345 FC]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Owen Ebanks]]|age={{bda|1999|12|2|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=1|club=[[Scholars International SC|Scholars International]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Calyb Fredricks]]|age={{bda|2007|8|15|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Future SC]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Anthony Nelson (footballer)|Anton Nelson]]|age={{bda|1997|7|31|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Master's FA]]|clubnat=CAN|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Kameron Mendez]]|age={{bda|2001|2|9|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Scholars International SC|Scholars International]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|BAH}}; 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Gunnar Studenhofft]]|age={{bda|2002|4|5|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=4|club=[[Phoenix Rising FC|Phoenix Rising]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|AIA}}; 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Mason Duval]]|age={{bda|2001|8|24|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=1|club=[[Academy SC]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|HON}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Sebastian Martinez (footballer, born 1998)|Sebastian Martinez]]|age={{bda|1998|10|25|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club= [[345 FC]]|clubnat=CAY|latest=v. {{fb|HON}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Tyler Beckford]]|age={{bda|2006|8|10|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Inter Wichita]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|HON}}; 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
* {{small|INJ}} = Withdrew due to injury
* {{small|PRE}} = Preliminary squad
* {{small|TRA}} = Training player
* {{small|WD}}  = Withdrew (non-injury)
* {{small|RET}} = Retired
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|12 July 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Cayman Islands |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/38/Cayman_Islands.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Cayman Islands.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Period
|-
|rowspan=2|1
|align=left|'''[[Jabari Campbell]]'''
|23
|0
|2019–present
|-
|align=left|'''[[Wesley Robinson (footballer)|Wesley Robinson]]'''
|23
|0
|2015–present
|-
|3
|align=left|[[Mark Ebanks]]
|21
|7
|2010–2023
|-
|4
|align=left|'''[[D'Andre Rowe]]'''
|20
|0
|2019–present
|-
|5
|align=left|'''[[Trey Ebanks]]'''
|19
|0
|2019–present
|-
|rowspan=3|6
|align=left|[[Ian Lindo]]
|18
|1
|2001–2011
|-
|align=left|'''[[Matthew Suberan]]'''
|18
|0
|2011–present
|-
|align=left|'''[[Elijah Seymour]]'''
|18
|3
|2019–Present
|-
|rowspan=4|9
|align=left|[[Theron Wood]]
|17
|1
|2008–2021
|-
|align=left|[[Joshewa Frederick-Charlery]]
|17
|0
|2015–2023
|-
|align=left|[[Garth Anderson]]
|17
|2
|1999–2008
|-
|align=left|'''[[Christopher Reeves (footballer)|Christopher Reeves]]'''
|17
|2
|2018–Present
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Period
|-
|1
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Lee Ramoon]]
|10
|15
|{{#expr:10/15 round 2}}
|1979–2002
|-
|2
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Mark Ebanks]]
|7
|21
|{{#expr:7/21 round 2}}
|2010–2023
|-
|3
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Erickson Brown-Morfy]]
|5
|16
|{{#expr:5/16 round 2}}
|1998–2009
|-
|rowspan=2|4
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Gunnar Studenhofft]]'''
|4
|7
|{{#expr:4/7 round 2}}
|2021–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Jonah Ebanks]]
|4
|14
|{{#expr:4/14 round 2}}
|2018–2023
|-
|rowspan=3|6
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Michael Martin (footballer, born 1998)|Michael Martin]]
|3
|8
|{{#expr:3/8 round 2}}
|2018–2020
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Gary Whittaker]]
|3
|9
|{{#expr:3/9 round 2}}
|1993–2008
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Elijah Seymour]]'''
|3
|18
|{{#expr:3/18 round 2}}
|2019–present
|-
|rowspan=6|9
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Carlos Welcome]]
|2
|4
|{{#expr:2/4 round 2}}
|1994–2004
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Marshall Forbes]]
|2
|5
|{{#expr:2/5 round 2}}
|2002–2008
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Anthony Ramoon]]
|2
|10
|{{#expr:2/10 round 2}}
|1993–2002
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Zachary Scott (footballer)|Zachary Scott]]'''
|2
|15
|{{#expr:2/15 round 2}}
|2022–present
|-
|align=left|'''[[Christopher Reeves (footballer)|Christopher Reeves]]'''
|2
|17
|{{#expr:2/17 round 2}}
|2018–Present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Garth Anderson]]
|2
|27
|{{#expr:2/17 round 2}}
|1999–2008
|-
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan=14|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||colspan=9|''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan=6|''Not a FIFA member''
|-
|{{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||colspan=9 rowspan=8|''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 6
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
| 0
| 4
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 1
| 5
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 4
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 6
| 0
| 1
| 5
| 2
| 15
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 2
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| 4
| 0
| 1
| 3
| 2
| 18
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| 4
| 1
| 0
| 3
| 1
| 9
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/8!!colspan=7|—
!24!!1!!6!!17!!9!!62
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Championship]] / [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
|-
|[[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]] to [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]]||colspan=9|''Not a CONCACAF member''
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]||colspan=9 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]||colspan=9 rowspan=3|''Withdrew''
|-
| {{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|-
| {{flagicon|CRC}} {{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]||colspan=9 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|-
| {{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|-
| {{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/13!!colspan=7|—
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=22|[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
!colspan=11|League phase 
!rowspan=8|
!colspan=10|Final phase
|-
!Season
!{{Tooltip|Div.|Division}}
!Group
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/Relegation}}
!Finals
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group A|A]]
|3rd||6||4||0||2||7||8||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group D|D]]
|12th||4||0||2||2||3||11||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|6th||4||1||1||2||6||10||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group C|C]]
|5th||4||2||1||1||4||5||{{rise}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League|2026–27]]
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]||colspan=9|''To be determined''
|[[2027 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2027]]
|-
!colspan=4|Total!!18!!7!!4!!7!!20!!34!!—
!Total!!colspan=9|—
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Nations League history
|-
!First match
|{{fb|VIR}} 0–2 {{fb-rt|CAY}}<br>(5 September 2019; [[Upper Bethlehem, U.S. Virgin Islands|Upper Bethlehem]], United States Virgin Islands)
|-
!Biggest win
|{{fb|VIR}} 0–2 {{fb-rt|CAY}}<br>(5 September 2019; [[Upper Bethlehem, U.S. Virgin Islands|Upper Bethlehem]], United States Virgin Islands)
|-
!Biggest defeat
|{{fb|PUR}} 5–1 {{fb-rt|CAY}}<br>(26 March 2023; [[Bayamón, Puerto Rico|Bayamón]], Puerto Rico)<br>{{fb|ARU}} 5–1 {{fb-rt|CAY}}<br>(20 November 2023; [[Oranjestad]], Aruba)
|-
!Best result
|Promotion League B ([[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2024–25]])
|-
!Worst result
|12th – League C ([[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League#LeagueC|2022–23]])
|}

===Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[CFU Championship]] / [[Caribbean Cup]] record
!rowspan=22|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1978 CFU Championship|1978]] to [[1983 CFU Championship|1983]]||colspan=8|''Not a CFU member''
|colspan=6|''Not a CFU member''
|-
|{{flagicon|BRB}} [[1985 CFU Championship|1985]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|1||0||0||1||1||2
|-
|{{flagicon|Barbados}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''||colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|4||1||1||2||6||10
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]
|Group stage||6th||2||0||0||2||3||5
|2||1||1||0||3||2
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''
|2||0||0||2||2||11
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]
|3||0||0||3||3||13
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
|Group stage||7th||3||0||1||2||3||6
|3||3||0||0||13||2
|- style="background:#9acdff;"
|style="border: 3px solid red"|{{flagicon|Cayman Islands}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]
|'''Fourth place'''||'''4th'''||'''5'''||'''2'''||'''1'''||'''2'''||'''7'''||'''14'''
|colspan=6|Qualified as hosts
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|1||0||0||1||0||4
|-
|{{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
|Group stage||6th||3||1||0||2||2||5
|2||1||1||0||4||2
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]||colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|3||1||0||2||6||9
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]
|3||0||3||0||4||4
|-
|{{flagicon|Barbados}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]
|3||1||0||2||2||6
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]
|3||0||0||3||1||12
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[2008 Caribbean Championship|2008]]
|6||1||2||3||7||13
|-
|{{flagicon|Martinique|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Championship|2010]]
|3||1||1||1||5||4
|-
|[[2012 Caribbean Championship|2012]] to [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
!Total!!Fourth place!!4/14!!13!!3!!2!!8!!15!!30
!38!!10!!9!!19!!56!!92
|}

==Head-to-head record==
''As of 6 June 2026 after match against [[Gibraltar national football team|Gibraltar]]''<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.eloratings.net/Cayman_Islands|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Cayman Islands|website=eloratings.net|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=3 July 2017|archive-date=13 June 2006|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20060613024240/http://eloratings.net/Cayman_Isles.htm|url-status=live}}</ref>

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Positive Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Neutral Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Negative Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center"
|-
!width=220|Opponent<br />
!width=100|Pld<br />
!width=70|W<br />
!width=70|D<br />
!width=70|L<br />
!width=100|GF<br />
!width=100|GA<br />
!width=120|GD<br />
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|AIA}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 8 || 1 || +7
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ATG}} || 3 || 2 || 1 || 0 || 4 || 1 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ARU}} || 4 || 1 || 0 || 3 || 5 || 11 || -6
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BAH}} || 3 || 2 || 0 || 1 || 9 || 4 || +5
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BRB}} || 3 || 1 || 0 || 2 || 4 || 11 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BLZ}} || 2 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BER}} || 10 || 1 || 3 || 6 || 8 || 20 || −12
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BVI}} || 9 || 5 || 3 || 1 || 15 || 7 || +8
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CAN}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 11 || −11
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CUB}} || 15 || 0 || 3 || 12 || 4 || 46 || −42
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|DMA}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 2 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|DOM}} || 5 || 1 || 1 || 3 || 2 || 14 || −12
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SLV}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 1 || 8 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GUF}} || 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GIB}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 4 || –3
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GRN}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 4 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GLP}} || 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 1 || 14 || −13
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GUY}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 3 || 5 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|HAI}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 2 || 4 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|HON}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|JAM}} || 13 || 1 || 1 || 11 || 10 || 40 || −30
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MTQ}} || 5 || 0 || 2 || 3 || 2 || 13 || −11
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MDA}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 4 || −4
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MSR}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 2 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ANT}} || 1 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 0 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NCA}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|PUR}} || 4 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 1 || 14 || −13
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SKN}} || 3 || 0 || 2 || 2 || 3 || 6 || –3
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LCA}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 0 || 0 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SMN}} || 6 || 2 || 1 || 3 || 8 || 12 || −4
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|VIN}} || 3 || 0 || 2 || 1 || 3 || 7 || −4
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SXM}} || 3 || 1 || 1 || 1 || 8 || 5 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SUR}} || 4 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 0 || 7 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TRI}} || 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 2 || 19 || −17
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFFACD"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TCA}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 2 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor="#FFCCCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|USA}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 8 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor="#CCFFCC"
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|VIR}} || 4 || 3 || 1 || 0 || 7 || 3 || +4
|- class="sortbottom"
! Total || 121 || 24 || 21 || 76 || 118 || 303 || −185
|}

==Notes==
{{reflist|group=note}}

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20070602182014/http://www.fifa.com/associations/association=cay/index.html Cayman Islands] – FIFA.com (archived 2 June 2007)
*{{usurped|1=[https://web.archive.org/web/20030208135943/http://www.caymanfootball.ky/ Cayman Islands Football Association]}}. {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20081012054117/http://www.caymanfootball.ky/ |date=12 October 2008 }}.

{{cayman Islands national football team}}
{{Football in the Cayman Islands}}{{UK National Football teams}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of the Cayman Islands}}

[[Category:Cayman Islands national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
